creator: haraldei-freebsdbugz@anduin.net
text:
Pull request against battleblow/jdk21u repo here: https://github.com/battleblow/jdk21u/pull/4

Instead of reverting the original patch, this time I just tighten the `#ifdefs` so they only apply to OpenBSD. I think that's a better solution, at least for now, and will replace the other PRs with this one instead.
